content.en:
Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Many of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers Extreme Dao Creatures were very angry one by one, and they learned about the situation in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm through a special way.

Tens of thousands of Extreme Dao creatures joined forces to deal with Ye Tian, the Endless Lord, but they all failed, and nearly 20,000 Extreme Dao creatures were killed, and even the Extreme Dao Treasure couldn't kill Ye Tian, and Ye Tian took away an Extreme Dao Treasure.

"What should I do?"

An Extreme Realm Perfect Controller asked.

"In the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, you can't kill the Lord of Endless, even if you really pay an unimaginable price and kill it, it's just a clone, and it doesn't make any sense, so forget it. Find an opportunity to kill its body at the end of the realm. "

"That's all there is to it!"

These Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers agreed to this decision one after another, although they were helpless, but there was nothing they could do.

......

Time passed slowly, and an eternal age was coming to an end.

this day.

One by one, the super-level perfect controllers were ostracized from the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, and they all appeared at the entrance of the East Gate of the Extreme Road.

And Ye Tian also came out.

"Ye Tian, congratulations!"

The Lord of the Ancient was very excited.

The first place on the Extreme Dao Genius Battle Killing List, what an honor this is, representing Ye Tian in the two places of the end of the realm and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, he is the most powerful super-level perfect controller, and he is truly invincible at the same level!

"Very good!"

The Lord of the White Night also spoke.

"No. 1 on the killing list!"

Ye Tian was not surprised, after all, he had killed so many extreme creatures, if he couldn't get into the first place on the killing list, it would be abnormal.

This moment.

Ye Tian felt the gazes of a large number of powerhouses, many of which came from the eyes of the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm.

Obviously, he entered the first place on the Extreme Genius Battle Killing List, which stunned these Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

But soon, many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers noticed the Golden Extreme Dao Tablet in Ye Tian's hand, this thing could not be included in the Void Treasure, so it was naturally spied on by these Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

"Golden Pole Dao Monument, good thing!"

These Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are a little impatient, such a good thing is too valuable for a force, enough to be comparable to many strong people!

"It turned out to be the Golden Pole Dao Monument!"

The Lord of the White Night was a little surprised.

The end of the realm is not like the Extreme Deep Sea, maybe in the Extreme Deep Sea, those perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm don't care much about such treasures, but if they are placed at the end of the realm, they care!

"Everyone, the Golden Extreme Dao Monument is a treasure obtained by the Endless Lord of my Daoless Tower, if anyone dares to snatch it, it will be an enemy of my Daoless Tower!"

The Lord of the Ancients.

He knew very well that many forces wanted to get the Golden Pole Dao Monument, although everyone was a force at the end of the world, but they were not united!

Therefore, he was very wary of other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and if anyone dared to do it, he would definitely fight hard.

Fortunately, the surrounding Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers still didn't make a move, they felt that a Golden Extreme Dao Monument was not enough for them to fight with several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Daoless Tower, and it was not worth it.

Besides, if you really shoot, you may not be able to grab it.

So, they gave up.

Besides, the Lord of the White Night is still here, if they dare to make a move, it will not give the Lord of the White Night face!

"Ye Tian, I'll take you back first, the reward for you to get the first place on the killing list won't be distributed now. "

The Lord of the Ancients.

He only wanted to take Ye Tian back to the Wudao Tower as soon as possible, and only after he went back would he be safer.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Ancient took Ye Tian and the Lord of Time and they returned to the Wudao Tower.

Along the way, although he received some peeps, there was no Extreme Perfect Controller to do it.

Eventually, they arrived safely at the Pathless Tower.

After coming back, Ye Tian contributed the Golden Pole Dao Monument to the Wudao Tower.

Of course, the Wudao Tower did not let Ye Tian contribute such a treasure in vain, and exchanged it for a contribution value of the same value, which could be exchanged for many resources and treasures of the Wudao Tower.

But right now, Ye Tian doesn't care about these things.

"Let's take that Extreme Dao Exotic Treasure Lotus first, one more Extreme Dao Exotic Treasure, you can arm one more copy body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he began to refine the intact Extreme Dao Treasure obtained in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, the Void Silver Shuttle, this Extreme Dao Treasure contains space, tearing, shattering, and penetrating the Extreme Dao, not only containing terrifying attack power, but also can be used on the road.

It can be said that the value of this Extreme Dao Treasure is much better than Ye Tian's Dao Destroying Sword.

"That Extreme Dao creature is too stupid, with such an Extreme Dao Treasure, he should be alone, make good use of the Extreme Dao Treasure to practice and enlighten, and should not participate in the incident of besieging and killing me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, fortunately, the other party was stupid, so this extreme treasure fell into his hands.

Not long after, Ye Tian successfully refined this Extreme Treasure Void Silver Shuttle.

In the following days, Ye Tian used the resources in his hands to improve his strength, such as breaking the Extreme Dao chains, he now had a large number of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, so it was not difficult for him to break all the Extreme Dao chains.

In addition, he also began to use the Golden Extreme Dao Treasure, and began to comprehend the Golden Extreme Dao, striving to cultivate the Golden Extreme Dao to the Dacheng realm.

Not only that, but he can also comprehend the Extreme Path of Light.

After all, he had fused the Extreme Dao of Light Ancestral Endowment of the Lord of the White Night, and it was naturally very easy to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tianxian lifted the Extreme Dao Monument of Time and Space and prepared to copy the Extreme Mangbai Grass.

The price paid by the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass was very small, and the time it took was also very small, and after dozens of eternal years, Ye Tian actually succeeded in copying the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass.

"The real Extreme Miscanthus White Grass can be used for refining, but the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass that I copied is not the real Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and it cannot be used as a resource to refine, so I can only forcibly comprehend a trace of the Extreme Light Extreme Dao in it. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

After Ye Tian's will forcibly entered the Extreme Mangbai Grass, he saw a terrifying force spread into his will.

In an instant, Ye Tian's body was severely damaged, but he also sensed the trace of Extreme Light Extreme Dao contained inside this Extreme Mangbai Grass.

After trying it several times, Ye Tian's replica body collapsed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian re-copied his body and continued to come to enlightenment.

At this time, he found that constantly contemplating this trace of the Extreme Light Extreme Dao would also consume the power of the Extreme Mangbai Grass Light Extreme Dao.

"It seems that it won't be long before this kind of forcible enlightenment is carried out, and this Extreme Miscanthus White Grass will also exhaust the power of the Extreme Dao of Light and become an ordinary Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, which is of no value. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he didn't have to worry about this problem, even if the Extreme Mangbai Grass was wasted, he could just continue to copy one plant.

Not long after, Ye Tian found that he could also accelerate his comprehension of the Extreme Dao of Light by using the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and coupled with the Extreme Dao Ancestor of Light, it wouldn't be long before he could comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light to the Xiaocheng realm.

"It's such a fast speed, I don't even think it will take me a long time to be able to cultivate the Extreme Dao of Light to the consummation realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
